# auditmos-lp

> The Auditmos landing page (auditmos.com rebuild) — Astro on Cloudflare Workers. Static-first, every URL also serves `text/markdown` at `<url>.md` for AI agent ingestion.

This repo-level `llms.txt` indexes documentation for AI agents working **on the codebase**. For the runtime LLM index served on the deployed site (which lists every page's `.md` twin), see `src/pages/llms.txt.ts` once that route lands (Phase 4).

## Project

- [README](README.md): Stack, quick start, scripts, structure, Cloudflare configuration
- [Project overview (CLAUDE.md)](CLAUDE.md): Conventions, verification gates, agent-facing instructions
- [PRD: auditmos.com rebuild](docs/prd-website-rebuild.md): Problem, solution, user stories, implementation decisions, validation strategy
- [Implementation plan](plans/website-rebuild.md): 7 phased tracer-bullet slices with acceptance criteria

## Rules

### General
- [General TypeScript & Cloudflare](.claude/rules/general.md): Type safety, error handling, naming, array access, bug fix workflow
- [Cloudflare Deployment](.claude/rules/cloudflare-deployment.md): Custom domains, SSL/TLS, redirect rules, Vite plugin environments
- [Error Handling](.claude/rules/error-handling.md): Drizzle error unwrapping, Result pattern, AppError flow (when applicable)
- [Atomic Imports](.claude/rules/atomic-imports.md): Combine import + usage in one Edit (PostToolUse cleanup)
- [Deep Modules](.claude/rules/deep-modules.md): Narrow interface, hidden implementation; module boundaries

### Frontend
- [Astro](.claude/rules/frontend/astro.md): Pages, layouts, server vs client, endpoints, content collections, Cloudflare runtime
- [Tailwind v4](.claude/rules/frontend/tailwind-v4.md): `@theme` tokens, `@utility`, variants, no `tailwind.config.js`

### API
- [Astro Endpoints](.claude/rules/api/astro-endpoints.md): Handler shape, Zod validation, response conventions
- [Cloudflare Workers](.claude/rules/api/cloudflare-workers.md): Worker patterns, bindings, secrets

## Agents

- [Design Doc Writer](.claude/agents/dd-w.md): Create design documents and technical specifications
- [Design Doc Implementer](.claude/agents/dd-i.md): Implement features from existing design documents
- [MVP Advisor](.claude/agents/mvp-e.md): Ensure speed-over-perfection principles

## Commands

- [Implement](.claude/commands/implement.md): Implement a design doc
- [Verify Design Docs](.claude/commands/verify-dd.md): Review design docs for implementation readiness

## GitHub issues

- [#1 PRD](https://github.com/auditmos/auditmos-lp/issues/1) — parent tracking issue
- [#2 Phase 1: Brand skeleton (HITL)](https://github.com/auditmos/auditmos-lp/issues/2) — no blockers
- [#3 Phase 2: Static content pages (AFK)](https://github.com/auditmos/auditmos-lp/issues/3)
- [#4 Phase 3: Projects collection (AFK)](https://github.com/auditmos/auditmos-lp/issues/4)
- [#5 Phase 4: MD-mirror + /llms.txt (AFK)](https://github.com/auditmos/auditmos-lp/issues/5)
- [#6 Phase 5: Contact form (HITL)](https://github.com/auditmos/auditmos-lp/issues/6)
- [#7 Phase 6: OSS aggregator (AFK)](https://github.com/auditmos/auditmos-lp/issues/7)
- [#8 Phase 7: Production cutover (HITL)](https://github.com/auditmos/auditmos-lp/issues/8)
